title: Colorful Leaf Litter🍃
description: A resource pack that changes the color of leaf litter to a more eye-catching color
body:
**Colorful Leaf Litter**🍃 is a Minecraft resource pack that transforms the appearance of the Leaf Litter block and item, bringing them to life with dynamic, biome-aware coloration.

🖼️ **Visual Preview**
![Leaf Litter in the 🌸cherry blossom biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a747fb78efc24c8d92cf53835a6084df1e08724.png)

**Custom Coloring**: Utilizes a custom colormap to adjust the Leaf Litter's color based on the biome's temperature and humidity, ensuring seamless integration with the surrounding environment.

_Colorful Leaf Litter_ is perfect for players seeking a more immersive and visually cohesive Minecraft experience. By enhancing the subtle details of the environment.
